description_1: Initial registration accepted by the network Type: decision Properties: {'entity': 'AMF', 'condition': 'Network accepts the initial registration request', 'outcomes': [{'outcome': 'Send REGISTRATION ACCEPT message to the UE', 'next_step': '5'}, {'outcome': 'Send REGISTRATION REJECT message to the UE', 'next_step': '9'}]}

description_1: UE receives REGISTRATION ACCEPT, resets registration attempt counter, enters state 5GMM-REGISTERED and sets the 5GS update status to 5U1 UPDATED. Type: process Properties: {'state_after': '5GMM-REGISTERED', 'entity': 'UE', 'update_status': '5U1 UPDATED'}
description_2: UE resets the registration attempt counter, enters state 5GMM-REGISTERED and sets the 5GS update status to 5U1 UPDATED Type: process Properties: {'state_change': '5GMM-REGISTERED', 'entity': 'UE'}

description_1: AMF stops timer T3550 and changes to state 5GMM-REGISTERED Type: process Properties: {'entity': 'AMF', 'timers': ['T3550 (stop)'], 'state_after': '5GMM-REGISTERED'}
description_2: Upon receiving a REGISTRATION COMPLETE message, the AMF stops timer T3550 and changes to state 5GMM-REGISTERED Type: process Properties: {'state_change': '5GMM-REGISTERED', 'entity': 'AMF', 'messages': ['REGISTRATION COMPLETE']}

description_1: If a 5G-GUTI or the SOR transparent container IE is included in the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message, the AMF shall start timer T3550 and enter state 5GMM-COMMON-PROCEDURE-INITIATED. Type: process Properties: {'entity': 'AMF', 'timers': ['T3550 (start)']}
description_2: 5G-GUTI or the SOR transparent container IE is included in the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message Type: decision Properties: {'condition': '5G-GUTI or the SOR transparent container IE is included in the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message', 'outcomes': [{'outcome': 'AMF starts timer T3550 and enters state 5GMM-COMMON-PROCEDURE-INITIATED', 'next_step': '6'}, {'outcome': 'No 5G-GUTI or the SOR transparent container IE', 'next_step': '7'}]}

description_2: The network may initiate 5GMM common procedures, e.g. the identification, authentication and security procedures during the registration procedure, depending on the information received in the REGISTRATION REQUEST message. Type: process Properties: {'entity': 'AMF'}

description_1: 5G-GUTI or the SOR transparent container IE is included in the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message Type: decision Properties: {'condition': '5G-GUTI or the SOR transparent container IE is included in the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message', 'outcomes': [{'outcome': 'AMF starts timer T3550 and enters state 5GMM-COMMON-PROCEDURE-INITIATED', 'next_step': '6'}, {'outcome': 'No 5G-GUTI or the SOR transparent container IE', 'next_step': '7'}]}

description_1: UE resets the registration attempt counter, enters state 5GMM-REGISTERED and sets the 5GS update status to 5U1 UPDATED Type: process Properties: {'state_change': '5GMM-REGISTERED', 'entity': 'UE'}
description_2: Upon receipt of the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message, the UE shall reset the registration attempt counter, enter state 5GMM-REGISTERED and set the 5GS update status to 5U1 UPDATED. Type: process Properties: {'entity': 'UE', 'state_change': '5GMM-REGISTERED'}

description_1: The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE and the UE had set the CAG bit to 'CAG supported' in the 5GMM capability IE of the REGISTRATION REQUEST message Type: decision Properties: {'condition': "The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE and the UE had set the CAG bit to 'CAG supported' in the 5GMM capability IE of the REGISTRATION REQUEST message", 'outcomes': [{'outcome': "UE replaces the 'CAG information list' stored in the UE with the received CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE when received in the HPLMN or EHPLMN, replaces the serving VPLMN's entry of the 'CAG information list' stored in the UE with the serving VPLMN's entry of the received CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE when the UE receives the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE in a serving PLMN other than the HPLMN or EHPLMN, or removes the serving VPLMN's entry of the 'CAG information list' stored in the UE when the UE receives the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE in a serving PLMN other than the HPLMN or EHPLMN and the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE does not contain the serving VPLMN's entry", 'next_step': '10'}, {'outcome': "The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message does not contain the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE and the UE had not set the CAG bit to 'CAG supported' in the 5GMM capability IE of the REGISTRATION REQUEST message", 'next_step': '10'}]}
description_2: If the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE and the UE had set the CAG bit to "CAG supported" in the 5GMM capability IE of the REGISTRATION REQUEST message, the UE shall replace the "CAG information list" stored in the UE with the received CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE when received in the HPLMN or EHPLMN. Type: process Properties: {'entity': 'UE'}

description_1: The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the Operator-defined access category definitions IE, the Extended emergency number list IE ,the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE Type: decision Properties: {'condition': 'The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the Operator-defined access category definitions IE, the Extended emergency number list IE ,the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE', 'outcomes': [{'outcome': "UE returns a REGISTRATION COMPLETE message to the AMF to acknowledge reception of the operator-defined access category definitions, the extended local emergency numbers list or the 'CAG information list'", 'next_step': '12'}, {'outcome': 'The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message does not contain the Operator-defined access category definitions IE, the Extended emergency number list IE ,the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE', 'next_step': '11'}]}
description_2: If the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the Operator-defined access category definitions IE, the Extended emergency number list IE ,the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE, the UE shall return a REGISTRATION COMPLETE message to the AMF to acknowledge reception of the operator-defined access category definitions, the extended local emergency numbers list or the "CAG information list". Type: process Properties: {'entity': 'UE', 'messages': ['REGISTRATION COMPLETE']}

description_1: The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the UE radio capability ID IE or the UE radio capability ID deletion indication IE Type: decision Properties: {'condition': 'The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the UE radio capability ID IE or the UE radio capability ID deletion indication IE', 'outcomes': [{'outcome': 'UE returns a REGISTRATION COMPLETE message to the AMF to acknowledge reception of the UE radio capability ID IE or the UE radio capability ID deletion indication IE', 'next_step': '12'}, {'outcome': 'The REGISTRATION ACCEPT message does not contain the UE radio capability ID IE or the UE radio capability ID deletion indication IE', 'next_step': 'end'}]}
description_2: If the REGISTRATION ACCEPT message contains the UE radio capability ID IE or the UE radio capability ID deletion indication IE, the UE shall return a REGISTRATION COMPLETE message to the AMF to acknowledge reception of the UE radio capability ID IE or the UE radio capability ID deletion indication IE. Type: process Properties: {'entity': 'UE', 'messages': ['REGISTRATION COMPLETE']}

description_1: Upon receiving a REGISTRATION COMPLETE message, the AMF stops timer T3550 and changes to state 5GMM-REGISTERED Type: process Properties: {'state_change': '5GMM-REGISTERED', 'entity': 'AMF', 'messages': ['REGISTRATION COMPLETE']}
description_2: Upon receiving a REGISTRATION COMPLETE message, the AMF shall stop timer T3550 and change to state 5GMM-REGISTERED. Type: process Properties: {'entity': 'AMF', 'action': 'stop', 'name': 'T3550', 'state_change': '5GMM-REGISTERED'}

description_1: The AMF sends a REGISTRATION REJECT message to the UE including an appropriate 5GMM cause value Type: process Properties: {'state_change': 'N/A', 'entity': 'AMF', 'messages': ['REGISTRATION REJECT']}
